articles.title: ‘46 Times Faster Than Ethereum’ – Solana Races to the Top of CoinGecko’s List of Swiftest Blockchains
articles.description: Smart contract platform Solana (SOL) is moving to the top of CoinGecko’s list of fastest blockchains. In a new publication, CoinGecko says Solana is a staggering 46 times faster than its rival Ethereum (ETH), the second-largest digital asset by market cap, making it the fastest large blockchain on the market. articles.title: This is How Much Bitcoin (BTC) El Salvador Has Mined Using Volcanic Energy: Report
articles.description: Adding the 474 BTC mined since 2021 to the number of bitcoins El Salvador has purchased, the country now holds 5,750 BTC.
